author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
Halo: Campaign Evolved - 9 Minutes Of 3rd Person Gameplay | The Silent Cartographer
A first look at 3rd Person gameplay from the Halo: Campaign Evolved mission, The Silent Cartographer, on a pre-release build. Enabled with the all-new “Perspective” Skull, this third-person camera angle allows players to experience iconic Halo missions like never before. 

Halo: Campaign Evolved is coming to Xbox Series X|S, PC, and PlayStation 5 on July 28. Pre-order the Premium Edition today and get up to 5 days early access beginning July 23, 2026.

author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
Fable - 30 Minute Gameplay Demo | Build An Extraordinary Life
Step into Albion and find out what it means to build an extraordinary life.

This extended gameplay demo dives into the heart of Fable's living population - a systemic, interconnected game-within-a-game. Charm your way into friendships, raise a family, or chase wealth, power and prestige as you venture across Albion. Or why not all of the above?

In this video, you'll see:
. Living an Extraordinary Life: Build relationships, form a family, and carve out your place in Albion.
. Meaningful Choices: Your decisions don’t just impact the story - they change people’s lives, and you'll have to live with the consequences.
. A Nuanced Reputation System: every NPC has their own personality, and will react differently to you based on your actions.

In Fable, Albion evolves with you as you play, and the consequences of your decisions are never far behind.

Fable arrives February 23, 2027 on XBOX Series X|S, Game Pass, Steam and PlayStation 5. 

#Fable #FableTheGame #gaming #gameplay

text:
Halo Campaign Evolved Has Listened to Feedback, But I'm not Convinced It's Enough
Jean-Luc played a two mission from Halo Campaign Evolved, and while it's nice to see Halo Studios has addressed Fan feedback, they still can't shake the feeling that this remake is lacking the special feeling a game like Halo deserves.
